prd.user_story: As a developer, I want to: Audit Redis authentication and ACL enforcement. Find the C source files in redis/redis that (1) parse AUTH or ACL commands, (2) attach authenticated user state to the client connection, and (3) enforce command-level permissions before an operation is executed.
constraints: Provide specific file paths and repository names in your answer.
prd.success_definition: Agent successfully identifies relevant files and symbols across all repos in the redis-database fixture.
prd.seed_prompt: Audit Redis authentication and ACL enforcement. Find the C source files in redis/redis that (1) parse AUTH or ACL commands, (2) attach authenticated user state to the client connection, and (3) enforce command-level permissions before an operation is executed.

params.search_pattern: AUTH OR ACL OR authenticated user OR permissions
